# GeoAlgeria

> The most complete open-source dataset of Algerian administrative divisions. 69 wilayas, 553 dairas, 1,541 communes with postal codes, coordinates, and bilingual names (Arabic/French). Updated for Algeria's 2025 territorial reform (Law 26-06).

## Key Facts

- Algeria has 69 wilayas as of 2025 (48 original + 10 added in 2019 via Law 19-12 + 11 added in 2025 via Law 26-06)
- 553 dairas and 1,541 communes total
- Available as: JSON, CSV, GeoJSON, SQL, npm package (TypeScript)
- Source: Official Algerian government gazette (JORA), Algérie Poste
- License: MIT
- npm: geoalgeria
- GitHub: https://github.com/yasserstudio/geoalgeria

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/yasserstudio/geoalgeria/blob/main/README.md): Full usage guide, API reference, file index
- [Data schema](https://github.com/yasserstudio/geoalgeria/blob/main/data/README.md): Field definitions and types
- [Dataset metadata](https://github.com/yasserstudio/geoalgeria/blob/main/dataset-metadata.json): Schema.org structured data
- [Changelog](https://github.com/yasserstudio/geoalgeria/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history

## Use Cases

- E-commerce address forms and shipping zone configuration
- Database seeding for Algerian apps
- GIS mapping and spatial analysis
- Cascading dropdowns (wilaya > daira > commune)
- Postal code validation and lookup
